note: Crafts of the Gearlands/Numinous Reach (mechanical_spiritual axis) — the axis whose deep peak is What Sleeps Under. Enginecraft is the mechanical-pole tradition (Precursor arts at their most technical); Numenwork the spiritual-pole (the mystic disciplines the framework keeps converging toward). Learned by traveling the Reach or training with Enginewrights/the Numinous. Both drift the wielder toward their pole; the doubly-charged Forge of Ends is where they meet. Distinct from precursor.json: Precursor is the Valley's dangerous folk-access to the deep; these are the Reach's true traditions. axes signed for engine compat. Authored by Aevi (PO), SNG-016.

abilities.name: Enginecraft
abilities.narrationHints: Mechanism as a language spoken fluently — systems built, run, and understood at a depth the Valley's tinkers only gesture at.
abilities.description: The mechanical-pole mastery: design, run, and command machine-systems, Precursor works included, at the Enginewrights' depth.
abilities.notFor: The numinous/meaning side of a Precursor site (that's Numenwork); life or growth; anything that must be felt rather than built.

tree.name: The Wright's Eye
tree.grants: Understand any mechanism's design and purpose on study; build reliable machines and devices; run Precursor systems that Latticespeak could only ask.
tree.cannot: Understanding function is not understanding WHY it was made; live-hostile systems still resist.

tree.name: System-Speaker
tree.grants: Command a machine-system to reconfigure toward your intent; chain devices into working wholes; repair or repurpose Precursor works at the component level.
tree.cannot: The system does what its mechanism allows, not what you wish; the numinous layer stays opaque — you move the body, not the meaning.

tree.name: Master of the Works
tree.grants: Command machine-country — a whole Precursor installation bent toward a purpose; wake or still a mechanical site at scale; build engines that outlive you. The Great Engine's power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts hard-mechanical; a person who becomes all-Engine forgets why anything is FOR — the framework's foreclosure by another road; and the Great Engine notices a rival wright.

abilities.name: Numenwork
abilities.narrationHints: The disciplines of pure meaning — attention made a force, presence that changes what it attends to, the material world going briefly negotiable.
abilities.description: The spiritual-pole mastery: the mystic practices where meaning acts directly on the world. The road the Valley's framework keeps recognizing itself in.
abilities.notFor: Building or commanding mechanism (that's Enginecraft); forcing an outcome (Numenwork attends, it does not compel); anything that treats spirit as a lever.

tree.name: True Attention
tree.grants: Attend so fully that the truth of a person, place, or moment surfaces; steady a soul in crisis by presence alone; perceive the meaning-layer of a Precursor site the Engine can't reach.
tree.cannot: Attention reveals and steadies; it does not command or coerce; the unwilling can close to it.

tree.name: The Negotiable World
tree.grants: Where meaning is dense, the material softens — a symbol made briefly real, a threshold held open by significance, a wound that was always metaphor healed as one. Read the numinous truth of the deep works.
tree.cannot: Only where meaning already runs dense; it bends the world, never breaks it; the price is proportional to the bending.

tree.name: The Standing Presence
tree.grants: Attention as a force that holds — keep a foreclosing thing open by significance alone, hold a truth in a place until it can't be unsaid, meet the numinous heart of What Sleeps Under as an equal rather than a trespasser. The Numen's power in miniature; the framework's 'hold the aperture' made a discipline.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts hard-spiritual, toward leaving the material behind entirely; presence holds, it does not decide; what you hold open, others must walk through.
